Protein families: Class IV-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, RNA methyltransferase TsnR/AvirB family
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class IV-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. RNA methyltransferase TsnR/AvirB family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=uridine(2479) in 23S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 2'-O-methyluridine(2479) in 23S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:43092, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10335, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10336, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:65315, ChEBI:CHEBI:74478; EC=2.1.1.208; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:12828631};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Specifically methylates the 2'-O-ribose position of uridine-2479 in 23S ribosomal RNA. Confers resistance to antibiotic avilamycin, an orthosomycin antibiotic. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:11181344, ECO:0000269|PubMed:12828631}.
